target: 35. Capture the Shadow
Ryunosuke Minakata

(The layout of the third floor is…
There are three storage areas and a toilet… one couple's bedroom.
There's a balcony…)

(And the next room is the children's room…
It's a corner room with two windows…)

(North side - there's also a balcony…
The window is slightly open…)

(I should contact them again.
The window on the north side of the third floor…)
You're wasting your time looking behind me.

After emitting a copy of the light,
you'll be unable to move for a few seconds.

It seems it takes quite a bit of effort
to scan information about one person.
Do you think I'd miss that moment?

The moment you tried to copy me!
I'll kill you this time…!
…How boring.
Shinpei Ajiro

As Shinpei Ajiro said,
I'll probably let Shiori escape.

Hey, hey…
You expect me to believe this nonsense?

Thinking about how it might fail before even trying,
you're just being weak.
That's probably why you'll fail!!

Absurd…!!
This has nothing to do with that old-fashioned mentality.
Guh…!

Don't misunderstand.
I have no intention of letting Shiori escape.

I'll move as usual inside the house,
but you'll have to take different actions outside!

This is where it matters…
I'll have Nezu cover the south side as backup.
I planned for him to wait in the back of the house.

This is a position where I can see the kitchen and toilet windows,
as well as the front door.

That's why they escaped…
Even the bathroom window can't be ignored…
It's likely that they escaped from the second floor.
I'm guessing it's Shiori's room on the third floor.
Because only Shiori's room has a window on the north side.

When I give the signal,
you'll take weapons and wait at the front of the house.
Nezu, there's a shadow coming from the window!

Here he comes…!
This is the…
"Plan B"!!
…What?!

I thought I had it sewn up…
But I missed the third one…!!
If that's the case…
Come on!!

(…!
He's coming this way!!)

(That means he hasn't noticed me hiding…
!)
(If I'm going to move, now's the time…)

(What should I do…?
It's still too far to shoot…?
Then… I'll jump on him and stop his movement!?)

(This is my first time shooting with the nail gun…
If I miss here…
No, there's no time to think!)

(He's getting closer and closer!!
Prepare yourself!!)
…Damn it!!
(I was noticed!!)
(No time to hesitate!!)

(This is my only chance!!
I'll shoot, me!!)
…Damn it!!
(I missed!!)
(We have to do something about this!!)
(But how…?)
Get out of my way!!
What?!

She stopped moving!!
Shinpei-san!!
Crap!!
(This is it!!)
What?!
Guh… Ohhhhh!!!

…You!!
You did it!!

You're annoying…
Let go, you idiot!
You killed Ushio!!

Enough already…
Get off, Shinpei…
I drove a nail into the shadow.
It can't even move a finger now…
…Ga… What…?!
It doesn't matter if it's one or two…

If you pierce it in three places…
Pinning it with nails or stakes will work…
They'll be pinned in place…!! That's how you capture them!!

So… capturing…
Plan B…
You planned this all along!?
Yeah.
I didn't hear that!!

I didn't say that!
I never expected anything from you!
(You old bastard…)

Well, anyway…
It was a spur-of-the-moment action.

(This could change the future!
…For sure!!)
Why did you jump in?

That's because…
I chose the more reliable method.

If I could stop the shadow's movement even slightly,
I was sure Nezu would handle it.
Mm…

Well, in short…
It was an impulsive action.

I see…
The shadow can hide in a flat surface,
and move quickly.

…But it seems that if you grab the solid form,
it can't hide anymore.

That's a new discovery, Shinpei-san!!
Thanks to you, I didn't let it escape!

We two probably would have failed,
Nezu-san.
Hmph… You're surprisingly steady for your age…
Alright then.
(Nezu… )
Hahahahahahahahahahahahah…

Hah!
Hahahahahahahah…
What's so funny?

…Both of you.
This one is different from the other shadows.

I changed to capturing it
because I wanted to study this one.
It's different…?
First, I want to answer your question earlier, Shinpei-san…

Did you kill Ushio,
and create this shadow?

Ah~…
Ushio-nee…

Yeah, I killed her.
I choked her to death.
…Killed…?

Shinpei-san.
Stay calm.

Why!?
Why did you kill Ushio…!

What are you guys doing!!?
Killing people and switching places…
What's the point!!?

It's over… this summer.
It's all over.

That's why I'm going back.
I'm going back with my family.

…What?
What are you talking about?

Kukukukukuku…
Don't be so scared…

Shinpei-san…
You're misunderstanding.

I, the human, was indeed killed by the shadow,
but I'm not the shadow's enemy…
I'm not scared anymore…
The shadow copied me perfectly…

Body, heart, memories.  
That's why I'm Shiori Kobayakawa.
I was just reborn…

Don't lie!!  
You're not Shiori-chan!!

Shiori-chan too! Her family too!  
You killed them, didn't you?!
You should become a shadow sooner, Shinpei…

Huh?  
Be my older brother.

Ufu…  
Hahaha… Hahahaha… Fufu!
Ku…!

Hahaha… Hahahaha…  
Fufu… Hahaha…

Let's stop here…  
Talking to the shadow too long might make you lose yourself.
…Damn…

(The person who killed Ushio…  
I was going to kill them when I found them…)

(If it's a monster,  
I wouldn't hesitate…)

(But when it appears right in front of me…  
In the form of a neighborhood kid I've known since childhood…)

(I couldn't even kill it…  
I couldn't even hit it…!!)
